reviews.comment:
Ideal para descansar  tomar unos mates y luego continuar con el viaje pero eso no es todo  .La limpiza en los baños esta de 10 y el agua caliente para el mate es gratis y el lugar es muy acogedor con una buena Vista panoramica ...

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for relaxing, having some mate, and then continuing your journey, but that's not all. The bathrooms are spotless, hot water for mate is free, and the place is very welcoming with a great panoramic view...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdmYyVlJREAE
